\tzpentry{ID4189}{Text Fisher Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4189 introduces Text Fisher Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{ij}^{\\text{Fisher}} = \\mathbb{E}\\left[\\frac{\\partial \\log \\mathcal{L}(\\mathbf{x}|\\theta)}{\\partial\\theta^i} \\frac{\\partial \\log \\mathcal{L}(\\mathbf{x}|\\theta)}{\\partial\\theta^j}\\right] \\end{equation}
